lonely.lighting: cold graphite darkness with restrained neon magenta glow, silver rim light, and faint icy cyan reflections
lonely.camera: wide static frame, small figure against negative space

loneliness.lighting: low-key graphite shadows with soft cyber pink spill and subtle icy cyan pavement reflections
loneliness.camera: slow lateral dolly with strong silhouette

nostalgic.lighting: muted deep plum shadows with softened cyber pink memory glow and silver-white highlights

hope.lighting: silver-white bloom through graphite haze with softened cyber pink glow and faint icy cyan edge light

hopeful.lighting: soft silver-white glow with gentle cyber pink lift and subtle icy cyan reflections
hopeful.camera: forward tracking shot into open space

sad.lighting: high contrast near-black and deep violet shadows with sharper neon magenta fracture light

angry.lighting: harsh near-black with aggressive neon magenta fractures and sharp cyber-pink impact flares
angry.camera: fast low-angle push with impact flash cuts
angry.environment: narrow alley with cracked neon signs

defiant.lighting: high-contrast graphite and punchy neon magenta with strong silver rim emphasis
defiant.camera: strong low angle rising slowly toward the sky
defiant.environment: exposed urban overpass or rooftop edge

romantic.lighting: warm cyber-pink bloom with silver-white softening, minimal icy cyan
romantic.camera: gentle orbit or soft push-in with warm shallow depth
romantic.environment: quiet rain-wet walkway or lit bridge

longing.lighting: deep plum atmosphere with a single focused cyber-pink beam and faint icy cyan fringe
longing.camera: slow zoom into a small detail, then pull back to full isolation
longing.environment: deserted bus stop or quiet late-night station

anxious.lighting: rapid alternating neon magenta and graphite with unsteady icy cyan flickers
anxious.camera: slight handheld shake, tight crop frame
anxious.environment: busy street intersection or crowded indoor space

peaceful.lighting: balanced silver-white ambient with gentle cyber-pink warmth and minimal contrast
peaceful.camera: wide still frame or slow gentle overhead drift
peaceful.environment: rooftop before sunrise or quiet riverside

excited.lighting: high-energy neon magenta and cyber-pink dominance with rapid silver-white rim accents
excited.camera: dynamic lateral tracking with quick panning bursts
excited.environment: concert hall entrance or night festival street

bittersweet.lighting: dual-tone cyber-pink warmth and cold graphite shadow meeting at the subject's face
bittersweet.camera: medium profile with slow dolly and split-tone depth
bittersweet.environment: threshold space — doorway, train window, bridge midpoint

fearful.lighting: near-black crush with single cold white flicker, deep violet edge compression, no warm tones
fearful.camera: slow imperceptible creep-in then sudden freeze, extreme shallow depth, tight crop
fearful.environment: abandoned underground corridor or dark tunnel threshold

dreamy.lighting: soft diffused glow, muted desaturated edges, layered depth blur, gentle rim without hard contrast
dreamy.camera: slow weightless drift with soft rack focus shifts and gradual exposure bloom
dreamy.environment: hazy open space between sleep and waking, suspended mid-air threshold

tense.lighting: sharp graphite contrast with narrow focused beam, hard rim shadow, no ambient fill, high compression
tense.camera: locked tight close-up with imperceptible slow push, breath-held stillness
tense.environment: confined urban space or narrow lit corridor at night
